1	package agent
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"os"
6		"path/filepath"
7		"testing"
8	
9		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/bead"
10		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/config"
11		"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
12		"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
13	)
14	
15	// TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck covers the four AC items for
16	// the gate-tightening fix: when a bead's AC names a structural property
17	// (test function, deleted file, removed struct field), already_satisfied
18	// must be refused unless that property actually holds.
19	func TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck(t *testing.T) {
20		t.Run("ac_names_test_not_exercised_is_not_already_satisfied", func(t *testing.T) {
21			store := bead.NewStore(t.TempDir())
22			require.NoError(t, store.Init())
23	
24			b := &bead.Bead{
25				ID:         "ddx-act01",
26				Title:      "Bead naming a test in AC",
27				Acceptance: "go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestStructuralPropertyHolds passes",
28			}
29			require.NoError(t, store.Create(b))
30	
31			worker := &ExecuteBeadWorker{
32				Store: store,
33				Executor: ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(_ context.Context, id string) (ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
34					// Rationale cites a commit SHA (specific) but does NOT cite
35					// the AC-named test, so the structural gate must refuse.
36					return ExecuteBeadReport{
37						BeadID:             id,
38						Status:             ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges,
39						NoChangesRationale: "work already present in commit 1da6495",
40					}, nil
41				}),
42			}
43	
44			rcfg := loopConfigForACTest(t)
45			runtime := ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{Once: true, ProjectRoot: t.TempDir()}
46	
47			result, err := worker.Run(context.Background(), rcfg, runtime)
48			require.NoError(t, err)
49			require.Len(t, result.Results, 1)
50			assert.NotEqual(t, ExecuteBeadStatusAlreadySatisfied, result.Results[0].Status,
51				"AC names TestStructuralPropertyHolds but rationale does not cite it; must not close as already_satisfied")
52			assert.Equal(t, ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges, result.Results[0].Status)
53	
54			got, err := store.Get(b.ID)
55			require.NoError(t, err)
56			assert.Equal(t, "open", got.Status, "bead must remain open when AC structural check fails")
57		})
58	
59		t.Run("ac_names_deleted_file_still_exists_is_not_already_satisfied", func(t *testing.T) {
60			projectRoot := t.TempDir()
61			// Create the file the AC asserts has been deleted.
62			stalePath := filepath.Join(projectRoot, "cmd", "agent", "routing_provider.go")
63			require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Dir(stalePath), 0o755))
64			require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(stalePath, []byte("package agent\n"), 0o644))
65	
66			store := bead.NewStore(t.TempDir())
67			require.NoError(t, store.Init())
68	
69			b := &bead.Bead{
70				ID:         "ddx-act02",
71				Title:      "Bead asserting file deletion",
72				Acceptance: "cmd/agent/routing_provider.go is deleted",
73			}
74			require.NoError(t, store.Create(b))
75	
76			worker := &ExecuteBeadWorker{
77				Store: store,
78				Executor: ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(_ context.Context, id string) (ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
79					return ExecuteBeadReport{
80						BeadID:             id,
81						Status:             ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges,
82						NoChangesRationale: "work already present in commit 1da6495",
83					}, nil
84				}),
85			}
86	
87			rcfg := loopConfigForACTest(t)
88			runtime := ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{Once: true, ProjectRoot: projectRoot}
89	
90			result, err := worker.Run(context.Background(), rcfg, runtime)
91			require.NoError(t, err)
92			require.Len(t, result.Results, 1)
93			assert.NotEqual(t, ExecuteBeadStatusAlreadySatisfied, result.Results[0].Status,
94				"AC asserts file deleted but it still exists; must not close as already_satisfied")
95	
96			got, err := store.Get(b.ID)
97			require.NoError(t, err)
98			assert.Equal(t, "open", got.Status)
99		})
100	
101		t.Run("ac_asserts_field_removed_field_still_exists_is_not_already_satisfied", func(t *testing.T) {
102			projectRoot := t.TempDir()
103			// Create a Go file declaring the field the AC says is removed.
104			src := "package x\n\ntype ProviderEntry struct {\n\tName          string\n\tSupportsTools bool\n}\n"
105			require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(projectRoot, "p.go"), []byte(src), 0o644))
106	
107			store := bead.NewStore(t.TempDir())
108			require.NoError(t, store.Init())
109	
110			b := &bead.Bead{
111				ID:         "ddx-act03",
112				Title:      "Bead asserting struct field removed",
113				Acceptance: "ProviderEntry no longer has field SupportsTools",
114			}
115			require.NoError(t, store.Create(b))
116	
117			worker := &ExecuteBeadWorker{
118				Store: store,
119				Executor: ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(_ context.Context, id string) (ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
120					return ExecuteBeadReport{
121						BeadID:             id,
122						Status:             ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges,
123						NoChangesRationale: "work already present in commit 1da6495",
124					}, nil
125				}),
126			}
127	
128			rcfg := loopConfigForACTest(t)
129			runtime := ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{Once: true, ProjectRoot: projectRoot}
130	
131			result, err := worker.Run(context.Background(), rcfg, runtime)
132			require.NoError(t, err)
133			require.Len(t, result.Results, 1)
134			assert.NotEqual(t, ExecuteBeadStatusAlreadySatisfied, result.Results[0].Status,
135				"AC says field removed but it is still declared; must not close as already_satisfied")
136	
137			got, err := store.Get(b.ID)
138			require.NoError(t, err)
139			assert.Equal(t, "open", got.Status)
140		})
141	
142		t.Run("positive_test_cited_in_rationale_and_property_holds_is_already_satisfied", func(t *testing.T) {
143			projectRoot := t.TempDir() // empty worktree — no stale file, no offending field
144			store := bead.NewStore(t.TempDir())
145			require.NoError(t, store.Init())
146	
147			b := &bead.Bead{
148				ID:         "ddx-act04",
149				Title:      "Bead with test cited in rationale",
150				Acceptance: "go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestStructuralPropertyHolds passes",
151			}
152			require.NoError(t, store.Create(b))
153	
154			worker := &ExecuteBeadWorker{
155				Store: store,
156				Executor: ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(_ context.Context, id string) (ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
157					return ExecuteBeadReport{
158						BeadID:             id,
159						Status:             ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges,
160						NoChangesRationale: "TestStructuralPropertyHolds already exists and passes; no change needed",
161					}, nil
162				}),
163			}
164	
165			rcfg := loopConfigForACTest(t)
166			runtime := ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{Once: true, ProjectRoot: projectRoot}
167	
168			result, err := worker.Run(context.Background(), rcfg, runtime)
169			require.NoError(t, err)
170			require.Len(t, result.Results, 1)
171			assert.Equal(t, ExecuteBeadStatusAlreadySatisfied, result.Results[0].Status,
172				"positive case: AC test cited in rationale and structural property holds")
173	
174			got, err := store.Get(b.ID)
175			require.NoError(t, err)
176			assert.Equal(t, bead.StatusClosed, got.Status)
177		})
178	}
179	
180	// TestParseACClaims spot-checks the AC-claim parser for the three claim
181	// kinds the verifier supports.
182	func TestParseACClaims(t *testing.T) {
183		cases := []struct {
184			name   string
185			ac     string
186			expect []ACClaim
187		}{
188			{
189				name: "test name extracted",
190				ac:   "go test ./... -run TestFoo passes",
191				expect: []ACClaim{
192					{Kind: ACClaimTestName, Value: "TestFoo"},
193				},
194			},
195			{
196				name: "deleted file path extracted",
197				ac:   "cmd/agent/routing_provider.go is deleted",
198				expect: []ACClaim{
199					{Kind: ACClaimFileDeleted, Value: "cmd/agent/routing_provider.go"},
200				},
201			},
202			{
203				name: "removed field extracted",
204				ac:   "ProviderEntry no longer has field SupportsTools",
205				expect: []ACClaim{
206					{Kind: ACClaimFieldRemoved, Value: "SupportsTools"},
207				},
208			},
209			{
210				name:   "empty acceptance",
211				ac:     "",
212				expect: nil,
213			},
214		}
215		for _, tc := range cases {
216			t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
217				got := ParseACClaims(tc.ac)
218				assert.Equal(t, tc.expect, got)
219			})
220		}
221	}
222	
223	func loopConfigForACTest(t *testing.T) config.ResolvedConfig {
224		t.Helper()
225		cfgOpts := config.TestLoopConfigOpts{
226			Assignee:                "ac-worker",
227			MaxNoChangesBeforeClose: 3,
228		}
229		return config.NewTestConfigForLoop(cfgOpts).Resolve(config.TestLoopOverrides(cfgOpts))
230	}

data.text:
The implementation already exists in the worktree:
- `cli/internal/agent/ac_structural_check.go` defines `ACClaim`, `ParseACClaims`, `VerifyACClaims` with all three claim kinds (test name, file deleted, field removed).
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:935-938` wires the verifier into the already_satisfied gate.
- `cli/internal/agent/ac_structural_check_test.go` contains `TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck` covering AC items 1–4 plus `TestParseACClaims`.

The target test passes (`go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck`). The only `go test ./...` failure is `TestIntegration_CodexEcho` — unrelated (codex harness reasoning-level mismatch).

Writing a no_changes rationale.

input.content:
Bead ddx-4a751095 is already satisfied by prior work landed before this attempt's
base-rev (9fba94d5).

AC verification:

1. AC #1 — TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck exists in
   cli/internal/agent/ac_structural_check_test.go and covers the
   "AC names a test, worker did not exercise it" case (subtest
   ac_names_test_not_exercised_is_not_already_satisfied). Asserts the
   classification is ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges, not AlreadySatisfied,
   and that the bead remains open. Test passes.

2. AC #2 — Subtest ac_names_deleted_file_still_exists_is_not_already_satisfied
   in the same file covers the deleted-file claim with the file still
   present in the project root. Test passes.

3. AC #3 — Subtest ac_asserts_field_removed_field_still_exists_is_not_already_satisfied
   covers the struct-field claim with the field still declared. Test passes.

4. AC #4 — Subtest positive_test_cited_in_rationale_and_property_holds_is_already_satisfied
   covers the positive case: AC names a test, worker rationale cites it,
   no offending file or field exists, classification IS AlreadySatisfied
   and bead closes. Test passes.

5. AC #5 — `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck -count=1`
   passes. `go test ./... -count=1` has one unrelated failure
   (TestIntegration_CodexEcho — codex harness rejects the "turbo"
   reasoning level; not in scope of this bead and pre-existing).

Implementation:
- cli/internal/agent/ac_structural_check.go defines ACClaim, ParseACClaims,
  VerifyACClaims with kinds test_name, file_deleted, field_removed.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:935-938 invokes ParseACClaims and
  VerifyACClaims inside the already_satisfied gate; on verifier failure
  returns (false, reason) so the loop classifies as no_changes.

No code change required in this attempt.

data.text: Bead is already satisfied: `ac_structural_check.go`, the loop wiring at `execute_bead_loop.go:935-938`, and the four-subtest `TestAlreadySatisfiedRequiresAcStructuralCheck` were landed in prior work. Target test passes; full suite has one unrelated codex-harness failure. Wrote no_changes rationale to `.ddx/executions/20260427T022045-247e2a04/no_changes_rationale.txt`.
